channel.title: Somerset County Registry of Deeds
channel.description: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. Domain is hyphenated 'somersetcounty-me.org'; monitors fee-schedule content.

item.title: Page updated: Somerset County Registry of Deeds
item.description: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
